subcategory: glassmorphism music player with playlist controls
use_cases: Embedded music player in creative portfolios or personal websites
Audio streaming interface for media and entertainment web applications
Background music control widget for productivity or focus apps
Podcast or audio content player for media publishing platforms
Music preview component for e-commerce music stores or artists
ai_summary: A glassmorphism-styled music player component featuring a track playlist, playback controls (play/pause, skip, shuffle, repeat), progress visualization, and volume controls. The component showcases frosted glass aesthetics with semi-transparent backgrounds and modern gradient accents. Ideal for music streaming services, creative portfolios, or any web application requiring an elegant audio playback interface with contemporary visual design.
